title: Delete a Schedule
content:
# Delete a Schedule

To create a new schedule in Kelvin UI, click on the **Applications** menu item in the left hand sidebar, select a Kelvin SmartApp™ then click on the **Schedules** tab.

Find the wanted schedule and click on the **Delete** button.
summary: To create a new schedule in Kelvin UI, click on the Applications menu item in the left hand sidebar, select a Kelvin SmartApp™ then click on the Schedules tab. Find the wanted schedule and click on the Delete button.
